caption: A person is working on a craft project atop a light-colored wooden surface with visible grain and dark seams. In the upper left, a piece of light blue paper is visible. Next to it is a small packaged item with a floral illustration and the text "m heart" visible. In the initial moments, only the person's fingertips and a portion of their arm are visible on the left side. As the sequence progresses, the person's right arm enters the frame from the right, wearing a grey long-sleeved sweater and a black wristwatch. The person reaches across the wooden surface toward the blue paper and the packaged item. Their hand, adorned with a ring, moves quickly, creating a slight motion blur as they interact with the materials on the table.
